_description: Referral Tracking — reward tiers, program rules, notification templates, ID format

super_referrer.label: Super Referrer (3+ referrals)
super_referrer.note: Upgrade customer to super referrer status automatically at 3 successful referrals.

champion.label: Referral Champion (10+ referrals)
champion.note: Recognize publicly on social media (with permission).

qualification_rules: Referee must complete a paid service of $50 or more.
Referee must be a new customer — no prior service history at the shop.
Referrer reward is issued after referee's first paid visit is complete.
Rewards cannot be transferred or exchanged for cash.
One referral reward per household per calendar year for the referee.

notification_templates.referrer_reward_issued_sms: Hi [FirstName]! [RefereeName] just came in — your $25 referral reward is ready. Use it on your next visit. Thanks for spreading the word! — [ShopName]
notification_templates.referee_welcome_sms: Hi [FirstName]! Welcome to [ShopName]. You've got $25 off your first service, courtesy of [ReferrerName]. Call us at [Phone] to book!
notification_templates.reward_expiry_reminder_sms: Hi [FirstName], your $25 referral reward from [ShopName] expires in 30 days. Book your next service at [Phone] before [ExpiryDate]!

reporting.note: A referral program with a 20%+ conversion rate is considered high-performing for independent shops.
